---
title: "DiscoMatiX"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

<style>
body {
  text-align: justify}

h1 {
  text-align: center
}
</style>

Together with [Clare Patterson](https://patterlinguist.com/) and [Morgan Moyer](https://mcmoyer11.github.io/), I organize DiscoMatiX, a group of researchers working on **Disco**urse and prag**Mati**cs using e**X**perimental approaches. Our group is specifically focused on the interface between theoretical and empirical approaches, and we organize talks and discussions with invited speakers from the community. Visit our [webpage](https://discomatix.github.io/) to find out more.
